title: Analysis
description: Output of an analysis run: ranked indicators, peer comparisons, change detection, and narrative summary for a target geography.

analysis_id.description: Unique UUID for this analysis result.

target_geoid.description: FIPS GEOID of the primary geography being analyzed.

geo_level.description: Geographic level of the target geography.

year.description: Primary data vintage year for this analysis.

comparison_year.description: Earlier vintage year used for change-over-time calculations. Null if no temporal comparison.

peer_group.description: Peer group used for percentile rank and z-score calculations.

peer_count.description: Number of peer geographies in the comparison pool.

indicators.description: Analyzed indicator values for the target geography.

prior_value.description: Value in comparison_year. null if no comparison year or data unavailable.

change.description: Absolute change: value - prior_value. Null if either is null.

pct_change.description: Percent change: (value - prior_value) / prior_value * 100. Null if either is null or prior_value is 0.

moe.description: Margin of error at 90% confidence. Null if not applicable.

percentile_rank.description: Rank within peer group (0 = lowest, 100 = highest). Null if peer_count < 5.

z_score.description: Z-score within peer group. Null if peer_count < 5.

direction.description: Policy direction: whether a higher value is desirable. Null if contextual.

alert.description: Alert level based on percentile threshold rules. null = no alert.

source_id.description: Key into data/sources.toml for the upstream source.

flags.description: Data quality flags inherited from the underlying indicator record.

summary.description: High-level summary statistics across all indicators in this analysis.

alert_count.description: Number of indicators with a non-null alert level.

critical_count.description: Number of indicators at 'critical' alert level.

suppressed_count.description: Number of indicators with null values due to suppression or missing data.

top_strengths.description: Top 3 indicator_ids where percentile_rank is highest relative to peers (favorable direction only).

top_concerns.description: Top 3 indicator_ids at highest alert severity or worst percentile rank (unfavorable direction only).

narrative.description: Generated narrative text for policy audiences.

headline.description: One-sentence headline summarizing the most significant finding.

overview.description: 2–4 sentence overview suitable for an executive summary.

sections.description: Thematic narrative sections, one per category with findings.

model.description: LLM model identifier used to generate this narrative.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the narrative was generated.

htmlcraft_export.description: Metadata about the HTMLCraft deliverable generated from this analysis. Null if not yet exported.

filename.description: Suggested filename for the HTML deliverable.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this analysis was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this analysis was last updated.
